final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-style infographic plate for a Chinese ethnic minority costume (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a national museum exhibition panel aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include top header zone (main title + subtitle + intro), left structural breakdown zone with Chinese callout lines and detail close-ups, upper-right material/texture zone with swatches, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color palette and motif samples, bottom wearing sequence/assembly diagram + core features summary
Subject: must include a realistic full-figure ethnic minority costume as central subject, with detailed structural components labeled in Chinese
Scene/backdrop: must be museum-grade paper texture background (rice white, silk paper white, light tea tones)
Lighting/medium: needs a professional museum display lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, archival color direction — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: needs authentic fabric and material surface treatment — exact grain and weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese labels, titles, annotations, material descriptions, pattern symbolism explanations, color meanings, and core feature summaries as specified in layout zones
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve realistic structural accuracy, material authenticity, cultural explanations, and encyclopedic plate quality; layout must follow fixed zones: header / left breakdown / upper-right materials / mid-right symbolism / bottom sequence; avoid poster, studio photography, e-commerce, anime, or cosplay aesthetics
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography feel, e-commerce style, anime style, cosplay style, messy annotations, incorrect structures, illegible text, fake materials, excessive decoration
